query: Find 10 buildings in Kristiansand municipality within 50 metres of 200-year storm-surge areas, sorted by shortest distance first, and report both municipality and county.

1.description: get Kristiansand kommunenummer, name and geometry

2.description: get counties with geometry and name

5.description: get buildings in Kristiansand with geometry and attributes

6.description: select buildings within 50 m of 200-year storm-surge areas (dwithin)

7.description: compute distance from each selected building to nearest storm area

final.sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Kristiansand';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [fylker]
SELECT fylkesnummer, fylkesnavn, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM fylker_a60155918c4a47c2b78f4ab52fc2bfa4.fylke
WHERE fylkesnavn ILIKE '%Agder%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: spatial_join
-- left_source: 1
-- right_source: 2
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "geom_geojson"
-- right_geom: "geom_geojson"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, malemetode, opphav, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna;
